title: UPI OC No 177A FY 2026 27 Addendum to UPI Global Acceptance Limits and Country Code Enablement
text:
ALWAYS
INCE! | coenao

NATIONAL PAYMENTS CORPORATION OF INDIA

NPCI/UPI/OC-177A/2026-27 29" April 2026
To,

All UPI Members

Dear Sir/Madam,

Subject: Addendum to UPI Global Acceptance Limits and Country Code Enablement

With reference to NPCI/UPI/OC-177/2023-24, dated 31% October 2023, UPI Global transaction limits along
with the list of Country/Currency code to be enabled for UPI Global Acceptance were introduced. To expand
the reach,/of UPI Global Acceptance, the Limits and List of Countries for Global Acceptance are being
revised as below. All members are requested to note the following revisions and implement them as needed.

1. UPI Global Acceptance Limits

The per transaction and per day limit for UP] Global Acceptance in Europe (P2M) are being increased to 22
lakh. Each member bank may set their own limits, subject to the overall applicable limits, specified herein.
For regions other than Europe, UP! Global Acceptance transaction limits will continue to be governed by
NPCI/UPI/OC-177/2023-24.

2. Addition of New Countries for UPI Global Acceptance
The list of countries enabled for UPI Global Acceptance is also being updated. Members may enable the
codes of the newly added countries and currencies as needed. Please refer Annexure | for consolidated list

of country and currency codes and find below the new additions,

Country Country Code__| Transaction Currency Cod
Bahrain BH BHD
Cambodia KH KHR
Canada CA CAD
Kuwait KW. KWD
New Zealand NZ NZD
Oman OM OMR
South Africa ZA ZAR
Switzerland CH CHF

Issuer Banks, PSP Banks and UPI Applications are requested to take note of the above revisions, which
shall come into effect from 31% May 2026.

Further, it was also incumbent upon the banks to abide by the extant and future RBI, FEMA and other

relevant guidelines.
Yours Sincerely,

SD/-
Sourabh Tomar
Deputy Chief UPI Product

1001A, The Capital, B Wing, 10" Floor,
Bandra Kurla Complex, Bandra (E), Mumbai 400 051.
~ T: +91 22 40009100 F: +91 22 40009101
